description: VIN Verification — validates vehicle identification numbers against NHTSA decode, checks for theft records, and verifies physical VIN plate integrity

hard_stops.label: VIN Decode Failure
hard_stops.logic: VIN does not decode against NHTSA vPIC database — may be a non-standard or counterfeit VIN

hard_stops.label: NCIC Theft Record Found
hard_stops.logic: VIN matches an active NCIC stolen vehicle record — law enforcement must be notified immediately

hard_stops.label: VIN Plate Tampering Detected
hard_stops.logic: VIN plate photo analysis indicates signs of tampering, replacement, or alteration — requires law enforcement inspection

soft_flags.label: Confidential VIN Location Mismatch
soft_flags.logic: Federal confidential VIN (hidden VIN) location does not match expected position for this make/model — further inspection recommended
